items.title: Personalized Home Quality discovery
items.name: Personalized Home Quality discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether clearer multi-format home intent handling increases session starts without hurting satisfaction.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether home underperformance comes more from stale ranking, too much format mixing, or weak recovery of prior listening intent.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve Spotify's first-session impression by tightening home ranking quality, cross-format recirculation, and faster play starts.

riskFocus.question: Will listeners start more sessions if home becomes more context-aware across music, podcasts, and audiobooks?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Listeners convert more often when the first screen reflects recent intent rather than generalized personalization alone.

plannedActivities: Compare home-to-play rates across context cohorts.
Review session abandonment by content type mix.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which home modules should become default for high-intent return sessions in Q2.

items.title: Premium Value Clarity discovery
items.name: Premium Value Clarity discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing where Spotify loses listeners between Premium interest, purchase, and retained paid usage.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether purchase drop-off is driven more by plan complexity, household confusion, payment failures, or weak value articulation.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve entitlement clarity, plan comparison, and purchase reliability around Spotify Premium plans.

riskFocus.question: Will clearer plan fit and entitlement explanations increase paid conversion and reduce early churn?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Listeners are more likely to buy and keep Premium when plan tradeoffs and entitlement behavior are easier to understand.

plannedActivities: Map top drop-off points in plan purchase.
Review household and entitlement support tickets.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which plan explanations and account-state treatments become the standard Premium upsell pattern in Q2.

items.title: Artist Fan Conversion discovery
items.name: Artist Fan Conversion discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing where artist teams lose conversion between release planning, campaign setup, and post-launch fan response.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether conversion is constrained more by audience targeting, readiness friction, or weak post-launch feedback loops.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve release readiness, targeting, and fan-conversion feedback for artist and label teams.

riskFocus.question: Do artist teams get materially better campaign outcomes when targeting and release readiness are made more explicit?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Artist teams convert more listeners when launch constraints and eligible fan segments are visible before campaign spend starts.

plannedActivities: Review readiness failures on planned launches.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which campaign prerequisites become mandatory before broader release-tool rollout.

items.title: Creator Monetization Confidence discovery
items.name: Creator Monetization Confidence discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing which product changes most improve creator trust in monetization and advertiser trust in measured outcomes.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether confidence is constrained more by earnings legibility, inventory eligibility, or weak measurement feedback.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve creator earnings transparency, monetizable inventory growth, and advertiser outcome reporting.

riskFocus.question: Can creators and advertisers understand how Spotify turns consumption into earnings and measured outcomes?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Confidence increases when earnings and outcome drivers are surfaced through simpler, more causal reporting views.

plannedActivities: Map inventory eligibility and monetization drop-off.
Test more causal reporting explanations for creators and advertisers.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which monetization and reporting patterns become standard across creators and advertisers this quarter.
